---
title: "Guillaume Krivtchik"
listing:
  contents: posts/*/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, categories, date]
  categories: true
  feed: false
page-layout: article
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.home-intro}
# Guillaume Krivtchik

I build modelling and optimization tools for energy systems.

I currently work on energy systems modelling at the OECD Nuclear Energy Agency.

Before that: energy systems modelling at Terra Praxis; nuclear fuel cycle scenarios modelling at CEA.

## Projects

- [Nosy.jl](https://github.com/oecd-nea/Nosy.jl): composable, component-based energy system modelling and optimization toolkit
- [EnergyPathway.jl](https://github.com/GKrivtchik/EnergyPathway.jl): capacity expansion pathway layer built on top of Nosy.jl
- [NuclearFuelScenario.jl](https://github.com/GKrivtchik/NuclearFuelScenario.jl): small and fast nuclear fuel model for supply chain analysis

## Contact

Questions, corrections, or opportunities: [guillaume@gkrivtchik.com](mailto:guillaume@gkrivtchik.com)

:::

## Blog
